subject: A warm humanistic workspace where a small ceramic technology mascot helps organize knowledge cards, diagrams, and code fragments
environment: Quiet editorial studio blending handmade materials and subtle digital interfaces
composition: Mascot and knowledge system on the left two-thirds; clean negative space on the right for headline copy; layered foreground, midground, and background
style: Premium editorial illustration with tactile ceramic and paper textures, restrained interface overlays
lighting: Morning window light, soft shadows, calm atmosphere
palette: Oatmeal, clay, warm beige, muted sage, fog blue, charcoal
text: No rendered text; reserve space for HTML typography
constraints: Do not make the scene look like a generic SaaS stock illustration
Keep the right side visually quiet
